# Gcore Colocation

> Overview of Gcore Colocation - place customer-owned hardware in Tier 3 and Tier 4 data centers across 15 global locations with redundant power, DDoS protection, and round-the-clock on-site technical support.

- [Colocation](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/overview.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation - place customer-owned hardware in Tier 3 and Tier 4 data centers across 15 global locations with redundant power, DDoS protection, and round-the-clock on-site technical support.
- [Smart Hands](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/smart-hands.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation Smart Hands - a paid on-site technical support service for customer hardware at Gcore data center locations, with standard and high-priority tiers.
